paneContent:
‚óè Update spec to merge external-prototype into prototype (shell)
  ‚îÇ export STORYBOARD_CANVAS_ID="storyboarding/form-schema"
  ‚îÇ export STORYBOARD_SERVER_URL="http://localhost:1235"
  ‚îÇ
  ‚îÇ npx storyboard canvas update markdown-umdbac --canvas ${STORYBOARD_CANVAS_ID}
  ‚îÇ --content '# Artifact Schema & API Specification‚Ä¶
  ‚îî 190 lines...

‚óè Save output (shell)
  ‚îÇ npx storyboard terminal output --summary "Merged external-prototype into prototype
  ‚îÇ type" --content "Updated the spec: external-prototype is no longer a separate type.
  ‚îÇ It's just a prototype with a url field. When url is present, no index.jsx or flow is
  ‚îÇ generated. Added mutual exclusivity rule: url + flow cannot coexist." 2>/dev/null
  ‚îî 2 lines...

‚óè Good call. Updated the spec ‚Äî external-prototype is now just a prototype with a url
  field. When url is present:

   - No index.jsx generated
   - No flow file created
   - url + flow are mutually exclusive (validation rule)

  This drops us from 8 to 7 artifact types, and the schema/API/CLI all simplify
  accordingly.

 ~/workspace/storyboard-core/worktrees/0.5.0 [‚éá 0.5.0*%]
